Off Calendar Nov-19-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Michael J. Cheng, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Association Management Services
James E. Armstrong, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: State Compensation Insurance Fund

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Association Management Services' motion to compel further responses to request for production of documents is denied. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
